meaning: n.[动] 鸥,易受骗之人,笨人vt.欺诈,骗,使上当
examples: The gull held the fish in its beak.
Several other subspecies of gull are found in the region.
A lone sea gull flew across the sky.
There was no "silver bullet" to solve the gull problem, Mr Aldous informed his colleagues.
Nearby, a shocked vacationer dropped her snack as a gull swooped in from behind.
